emotional_tone: Futuristic, Highly Technical, Innovative, and Command-Center Elite

rules.notes: No Inter for headings. Keep hierarchy gaps tight. Use JetBrains Mono for tech-specific data, chat timestamps, and skill tags.

layout_and_spacing.global_spacing: Generous spacing strategy (p-8 to p-16) for Portfolio. Dense spacing (p-4 to p-6) for Admin CMS.

grid_modes.portfolio_gallery: Mode A (Tetris Grid): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gap-8. Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 for asymmetry.
grid_modes.admin_dashboard: Mode B (Control Room Grid): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gap-4. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 (dark) or bg-white/70 (light) with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10).
surface_strategies.skill_cards: The Tracing Beam: Use a subtle glowing gradient border effect for tech skills.
surface_strategies.chat_forum: Retro-Futurism: Deep black/indigo terminal look. Neon cyan borders (border-primary/50), JetBrains Mono typography, subtle text drop-shadow for 'hacker' vibe.
surface_strategies.admin_cards: Neumorphic/Flat hybrid: Flat background, 1px subtle border, sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-md).

interactive_background.concept: Matrix/Network hybrid. Subtle, slow-moving connected network nodes or falling 'code rain' particles. Must not distract from text.

navigation.style: Sticky top, z-50. Must include Logo (JetBrains Mono text), Links, Language Toggle (EN/ID), Dark Mode Toggle, and 'Admin Login' subtle link.

forms_and_chat.inputs: Shadcn UI heavily customized. Dark mode: bg-transparent, border-white/20, focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary. No generic Vercel looks.
forms_and_chat.chat_messages: Anonymous forum should look like a CLI/Terminal feed. Example: '[anon_142] $ Great portfolio!'

animations.hover: Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:text-black hover:bg-primary).
animations.reveal: Use framer-motion for staggered entrance animations on the timeline and portfolio grid.

hero_fallback.description: Futuristic tunnel with neon lights. Use as a fallback or subtle blended background if particles fail to load.

media.rules: Never use via.placeholder.com. Ensure images have a bg-black/50 overlay when text is placed on them.

tech_stack_instructions.icons: Install and use `lucide-react` (default) or `@phosphor-icons/react` for technical/duotone icons.
tech_stack_instructions.cms_crud: Admin dashboard must use Shadcn Tables and Dialogs for editing CV sections. Include custom JWT auth logic.
tech_stack_instructions.i18n: Implement a bilingual dictionary/context for EN/ID toggle. Default is EN.
